messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0165",
  "title": "1、重角色路径：以 《鸣潮》《原神》为代表，将角色作为核心互动触点，深耕角色 IP，借版本更新、角色纪念日策划 UGC 活动，深化用户情感绑定。",
  "page_index": 96,
  "page_range": "96"
}

Section text:
1、重角色路径：以 《鸣潮》《原神》为代表，将角色作为核心互动触点，深耕角色  IP，借版本更新、角色纪念日策划  UGC 活动，深
化用户情感绑定。

message.content: This section outlines the "character-centric path" (重角色路径) for game user engagement and IP cultivation. It identifies 《鸣潮》(Wuthering Waves) and 《原神》(Genshin Impact) as representative entities. The strategy defines characters as the core interactive touchpoint, focusing on deep character IP development. Procedurally, it involves organizing user-generated content (UGC) campaigns tied to version updates and character anniversaries. The core claim is that this approach successfully deepens emotional attachment between users and the game/IP. The section does not contain specific dates, quantitative metrics, tables, figures, or external evidence types. It can answer retrieval queries regarding: the definition and operational goals of character-driven engagement strategies; which major games exemplify this model; how version updates and character anniversaries are leveraged to drive UGC; and the mechanisms used to foster long-term user emotional binding.
